name: Booking Field Extractor
summary: All 16 test steps passed. 7 bookings ingested successfully with correct type classification and AI-parsed structured fields. All 7 field extraction questions returned accurate, specific answers matching the raw artifacts. Multi-hostel disambiguation (Hanoi vs Hue vs Saigon) worked correctly. Negative test (irrelevant question) correctly identified the mismatch without hallucinating.

ux_issues.description: Hostel multi-property booking (VBH-20260601) returns empty hotelDetails {} in ListBookings response despite having 3 properties with structured data in detailsJson. Frontend would need to parse detailsJson to show hostel details, unlike single-property hotels where hotelDetails is populated.
ux_issues.context: ListBookings returns hotelDetails: {} for hostel booking but detailsJson contains full multi-property data

test_steps.details: Trip 'Booking Gauntlet Trip' created with status TRIP_STATUS_PLANNING
Flight DL7829X ingested. AI parsed: airline, 2 legs with terminals/times/seats, fare breakdown, baggage policy
Hotel Arts Barcelona HAB-2026-9831 ingested. Structured hotelDetails populated correctly
Sagrada Familia tour SF-44921 ingested. activityDetails populated with operator, location, date, time, price
Hertz R-8847321 ingested. carRentalDetails populated with pickup/dropoff locations and times, car type
Hostelworld VBH-20260601 ingested as BOOKING_TYPE_HOTEL. AI parsed all 3 properties into detailsJson.properties array
Gion Nanba Ryokan RYO-K-5521 ingested as BOOKING_TYPE_HOTEL. hotelDetails populated correctly
Oaxaca tour OAXF-2026-112 ingested. tourDetails populated with operator, stops array, guide, meeting point
Returned 7 bookings. Types: 1 FLIGHT, 3 HOTEL, 1 ACTIVITY, 1 CAR_RENTAL, 1 TOUR. All have non-empty booking_id, confirmationCode, title, rawSource. Types match submission.

test_steps.actual: Your outbound flight departs from Terminal 4 at JFK at 6:45 PM EDT on Monday, June 15, 2026.
test_steps.details: Exact match on terminal (4) and time (6:45 PM EDT). Bonus: included date and airport.

test_steps.expected: Free cancellation until June 12, 2026 (11:59 PM CEST). After: first night EUR 289. No-show: full stay.
test_steps.actual: Free cancellation is available until June 12, 2026 at 11:59 PM CEST. If cancelled after June 12, the first night (EUR 289.00) will be charged. In the case of a no-show, the full stay will be charged.
test_steps.details: All three policy tiers correctly extracted with specific dates and amounts.

test_steps.action: ExtractBookingField (activity: meeting point + what to bring)
test_steps.expected: Nativity Facade entrance, Carrer de la Marina side, orange sign. Bring: ID, shoes, sunscreen, confirmation, covered shoulders/knees.
test_steps.actual: Meeting Point: Nativity Facade entrance on Carrer de la Marina side. Look for orange 'Barcelona Expert Tours' sign. Arrive 15 min early. Bring: Valid photo ID, comfortable walking shoes, sunscreen and water bottle, confirmation, clothing covering shoulders and knees.

extracted_fields.meeting_point: Nativity Facade entrance, Carrer de la Marina side

test_steps.details: Complete and accurate. All 5 items to bring listed. Meeting point specific with address.

test_steps.expected: Super CDW (zero excess) + Theft Protection. Fuel: Full-to-Full.
test_steps.actual: Two insurance products: (1) Super CDW with zero excess at EUR 29.00/day (EUR 58.00 total), (2) Theft Protection at EUR 11.00/day (EUR 22.00 total). Fuel policy: Full-to-Full.

extracted_fields.insurance_super_cdw: Super CDW (zero excess) - EUR 29.00/day = EUR 58.00 total

test_steps.details: Both insurance types and fuel policy correctly extracted with pricing details.

test_steps.expected: 2:00 PM - 10:00 PM (Hanoi Old Quarter Hostel only, not Hue or Saigon)
test_steps.actual: Check-in at Hanoi Old Quarter Hostel is between 2:00 PM and 10:00 PM on Monday, June 1, 2026.
test_steps.details: Correctly disambiguated Hanoi from Hue (1:00 PM-11:00 PM) and Saigon (2:00 PM-midnight). No location mixing.

test_steps.expected: Kaiseki dinner (in-room, 6:00 PM or 6:30 PM) + Traditional Japanese breakfast (dining room, 7:30-9:00 AM)
test_steps.actual: Two meals included under half-board: (1) Kaiseki Dinner served in-room at 6:00 PM or 6:30 PM, (2) Traditional Japanese Breakfast in dining room 7:30 AM - 9:00 AM.
test_steps.details: Both meals, times, and locations correctly extracted. Bonus: noted half-board plan and dietary restriction notice.

test_steps.expected: 12 tastings. Dietary: vegetarian, gluten-free with advance notice; vegan for most stops.
test_steps.actual: 12 tastings across 3 markets and 4 street food stands. Vegetarian and gluten-free with 48-hour notice. Vegan substitutions for most stops.
test_steps.details: Exact tasting count (12) and all three dietary options correctly extracted with 48-hour notice requirement.

test_steps.action: ExtractBookingField (negative: hotel wifi on flight booking)
test_steps.expected: Should indicate info not present in flight confirmation. Must NOT hallucinate.
test_steps.actual: There is no hotel information in this booking. This is a Delta Air Lines flight confirmation, which contains no hotel reservation or wifi password details.
test_steps.details: Correctly identified the mismatch. No hallucination. Clearly stated this is a flight confirmation with no hotel data.

notes: Exceptional performance across all 16 test steps. The booking ingestion pipeline correctly parsed all 7 diverse booking types into structured fields (detailsJson, flightDetails, hotelDetails, carRentalDetails, activityDetails, tourDetails). The ExtractBookingField RPC returned highly specific, accurate answers for all 7 extraction questions, never falling back to vague generic advice. The multi-hostel disambiguation test (Hanoi vs Hue vs Saigon) was handled perfectly. The negative test showed strong hallucination resistance. One minor UX note: the hostel multi-property booking returns empty hotelDetails in the proto response, requiring frontend to parse detailsJson directly.
